generatedSentence: An aging, reclusive former operative, currently inactive after a past fatality, lived in a dinky rustic nest. He was a gentleman with a persistent hangover, haunted by single decisions, trying to kickstarting a new life by tinkering with wonky old tech, needing better hygiene to feel remarkable. He sought to identify a personal unicum, a profound void he felt, hoping for a vacation from his painkiller-addled existence, an ardent desire for completions. He kept an old jacket as a memento, his only decoration, a reminder of a life he once knew. His hopes flickered like flint in the dark laminate of his life. A naga-like organization, once distinctly oriental but now rapidly westernizing, used shadowy mystics to provoke widespread uproar. News of dragon-related damage freaked him out, making his nose twitch with alarm. He recognized the destructive pattern from past battlefields, sensing a dangerous drama and unequal jurisdiction looming. A digital hornet of whispers trickled through his touchscreen, hinting at a coming lightning strike that would implicate him. He felt the strong opposite pull of right and wrong, feeling virtually insane with the weight of the new variables, unable to process the shifting reality. He commandeered a repurposed forklift to exhume a hidden ancient stork totem from behind a sunken wall, a needle point of immense power. He zipped up his worn jacket, his nickname echoing in the clandestine network, a name whispered among old allies. His trusted clutch of seasoned victors from former battlefield campaigns formed a strategic nexus, ready for anything. On a makeshift hoverboard, he engaged the elusive nightwalker, deftly weaving through the chaos. He torched their glowing pentagram and, through an embrace of calculated risk, achieved a narrow victory for his side, proving himself once again the true architect. He felt the urge to unpack old strategies and even borrow a few, knowing this was no longer a personal, wasting struggle. The winner stood on the green longitude line marking a new boundary, a reformed warden now. He didn't need to borrow power; he evoked empathic understanding, a change from his prior self. With rapidly acquired technique and visualization skills from a comprehensive workbook, he helped unpack the truth, providing crucial testimony for a new era. The reformed gourmand in him appreciated the simple umami of a fresh cucumber. His mind felt fortunate and clear, his old self reincarnate, no longer wasting time. The rapid thoughts, once a chaotic microwave, now formed an orchestra of calm reason, leaving the mental cloister of his painful past. He knew this was no virtual voyage, but a very tangible reality, achieved through intricate surgery on the world's hidden ills.
panelSentences: An aging, reclusive former operative, currently inactive after a past fatality, lived in a dinky rustic nest. He was a gentleman with a persistent hangover, haunted by single decisions, trying to kickstarting a new life by tinkering with wonky old tech, needing better hygiene to feel remarkable. He sought to identify a personal unicum, a profound void he felt, hoping for a vacation from his painkiller-addled existence, an ardent desire for completions. He kept an old jacket as a memento, his only decoration, a reminder of a life he once knew. His hopes flickered like flint in the dark laminate of his life.

A naga-like organization, once distinctly oriental but now rapidly westernizing, used shadowy mystics to provoke widespread uproar. News of dragon-related damage freaked him out, making his nose twitch with alarm. He recognized the destructive pattern from past battlefields, sensing a dangerous drama and unequal jurisdiction looming. A digital hornet of whispers trickled through his touchscreen, hinting at a coming lightning strike that would implicate him. He felt the strong opposite pull of right and wrong, feeling virtually insane with the weight of the new variables, unable to process the shifting reality.

He commandeered a repurposed forklift to exhume a hidden ancient stork totem from behind a sunken wall, a needle point of immense power. He zipped up his worn jacket, his nickname echoing in the clandestine network, a name whispered among old allies. His trusted clutch of seasoned victors from former battlefield campaigns formed a strategic nexus, ready for anything. On a makeshift hoverboard, he engaged the elusive nightwalker, deftly weaving through the chaos. He torched their glowing pentagram and, through an embrace of calculated risk, achieved a narrow victory for his side, proving himself once again the true architect. He felt the urge to unpack old strategies and even borrow a few, knowing this was no longer a personal, wasting struggle.

The winner stood on the green longitude line marking a new boundary, a reformed warden now. He didn't need to borrow power; he evoked empathic understanding, a change from his prior self. With rapidly acquired technique and visualization skills from a comprehensive workbook, he helped unpack the truth, providing crucial testimony for a new era. The reformed gourmand in him appreciated the simple umami of a fresh cucumber. His mind felt fortunate and clear, his old self reincarnate, no longer wasting time. The rapid thoughts, once a chaotic microwave, now formed an orchestra of calm reason, leaving the mental cloister of his painful past. He knew this was no virtual voyage, but a very tangible reality, achieved through intricate surgery on the world's hidden ills.
rawPanelSentences: An aging, reclusive former operative, currently **inactive** after a past **fatality**, lived in a **dinky rustic nest**. He was a **gentleman** with a persistent **hangover**, haunted by **single** decisions, trying to **kickstarting** a new life by **tinkering** with **wonky** old tech, needing better **hygiene** to feel **remarkable**. He sought to **identify** a personal **unicum**, a profound **void** he felt, hoping for a **vacation** from his **painkiller**-addled existence, an **ardent** desire for **completions**. He kept an old **jacket** as a memento, his only **decoration**, a reminder of a life he once knew. His hopes flickered like **flint** in the dark **laminate** of his life.

A **naga**-like organization, once distinctly **oriental** but now rapidly **westernizing**, used shadowy **mystics** to provoke widespread **uproar**. News of **dragon**-related **damage** **freaked** him out, making his **nose** twitch with alarm. He recognized the destructive **pattern** from past **battlefields**, sensing a dangerous **drama** and **unequal** **jurisdiction** looming. A digital **hornet** of whispers **trickled** through his **touchscreen**, hinting at a coming **lightning** strike that would **implicate** him. He felt the strong **opposite** pull of right and wrong, feeling **virtually** **insane** with the weight of the new **variables**, unable to process the shifting reality.

He commandeered a repurposed **forklift** to **exhume** a hidden ancient **stork** totem from behind a **sunken wall**, a **needle** point of immense power. He zipped up his worn **jacket**, his **nickname** echoing in the clandestine network, a name whispered among old allies. His trusted **clutch** of seasoned **victors** from former **battlefield** campaigns formed a strategic **nexus**, ready for anything. On a makeshift **hoverboard**, he engaged the elusive **nightwalker**, deftly **weaving** through the chaos. He **torched** their glowing **pentagram** and, through an **embrace** of calculated risk, achieved a narrow **victory** for his side, proving himself once again the true **architect**. He felt the urge to **unpack** old strategies and even **borrow** a few, knowing this was no longer a personal, **wasting** struggle.

The **winner** stood on the **green** **longitude** line marking a new boundary, a reformed **warden** now. He didn't need to **borrow** power; he **evoked** **empathic** understanding, a change from his prior self. With **rapidly** acquired **technique** and **visualization** skills from a comprehensive **workbook**, he helped **unpack** the truth, providing crucial **testimony** for a new era. The reformed **gourmand** in him appreciated the simple **umami** of a fresh **cucumber**. His mind felt **fortunate** and clear, his old self **reincarnate**, no longer **wasting** time. The rapid thoughts, once a chaotic **microwave**, now formed an **orchestra** of calm reason, leaving the mental **cloister** of his painful past. He knew this was no **virtual voyage**, but a very tangible reality, achieved through intricate **surgery** on the world's hidden ills.
imagePrompt: A professional 4-panel comic book page, 2x2 grid, sequential art, gritty neo-noir style, thick white gutters, clean black borders. A grizzled, middle-aged man with a salt-and-pepper beard, deep-set eyes, and intricate tribal tattoos on his arms, wearing a worn leather jacket. TOP-LEFT PANEL: the man alone in a derelict, junk-strewn apartment, staring at an old, flickering monitor, wide shot. TOP-RIGHT PANEL: the man reacting with shock to a holographic projection of a menacing, serpent-like entity, medium shot. BOTTOM-LEFT PANEL: the man, determined, operating a modified industrial forklift to unearth an ancient, glowing artifact, close-up, dramatic low angle. BOTTOM-RIGHT PANEL: the man standing calmly on a windswept cliff overlooking a recovered city, a peaceful expression on his face, medium shot. cel-shading, bold ink outlines, cinematic lighting. NO text, NO speech bubbles, NO dialogue, NO children.

definitions.definition: A large wading bird with long legs and a long beak of the family Ciconiidae.
(children's folklore) The mythical bringer of babies to families, or good news.
The seventeenth Lenormand card.
To dig out of the ground; to take out of a place of burial; to disinter.
definitions.example: The archeologist exhumed artifacts from the ground with a shovel.

definitions.definition: To uncover; to bring to light.
An act of putting arms around someone and bringing the person close to the chest; a hug.
An enclosure partially or fully surrounding someone or something.
Full acceptance (of something).
An act of enfolding or including.
To clasp (someone or each other) in the arms with affection; to take in the arms; to hug.
To seize (something) eagerly or with alacrity; to accept or take up with cordiality; to welcome.
definitions.example: I wholeheartedly embrace the new legislation.

definitions.definition: To submit to; to undergo.
To encircle; to enclose, to encompass.
To enfold, to include (ideas, principles, etc.); to encompass.
definitions.example: Natural philosophy embraces many sciences.

definitions.definition: To fasten on, as armour.
To accept (someone) as a friend; to accept (someone's) help gladly.
To attempt to influence (a court, jury, etc.) corruptly; to practise embracery.
A unique example or specimen of something
A small industrial vehicle with a power-operated fork-like pronged platform that can be raised and lowered for insertion under a load, often on pallets, to be lifted and moved
To move or stack with, or as if with, such a vehicle.
A flash of light produced by short-duration, high-voltage discharge of electricity within a cloud, between clouds, or between a cloud and the earth.
definitions.example: Although we did not see the lightning, we did hear the thunder.

definitions.definition: A discharge of this kind.
definitions.example: That tree was hit by lightning.

definitions.definition: Anything that moves very fast.
The act of making bright, or the state of being made bright; enlightenment; brightening, as of the mental powers.
To produce lightning.
Extremely fast or sudden; moving (as if) at the speed of lightning.
A familiar, invented given name for a person or thing used instead of the actual name of the person or thing.
A kind of byname that describes a person by a characteristic of that person.
To give a nickname to (a person or thing).
A loincloth.
A fine, sharp implement usually for piercing such as sewing, or knitting, acupuncture, tattooing, body piercing, medical injections, etc.
definitions.example: The seamstress threaded the needle to sew on a button.

definitions.definition: Any slender, pointed object resembling a needle, such as a pointed crystal, a sharp pinnacle of rock, an obelisk, etc.
A fine measurement indicator on a dial or graph, e.g. a compass needle.
definitions.example: The needle on the fuel gauge pointed to empty.

definitions.definition: A sensor for playing phonograph records, a phonograph stylus.
definitions.example: Ziggy bought some diamond needles for his hi-fi phonograph.

definitions.definition: A needle-like leaf found on some conifers.
A strong beam resting on props, used as a temporary support during building repairs.
(usually preceded by the) The death penalty carried out by lethal injection.
A text string that is searched for within another string. (see: needle in a haystack)
To pierce with a needle, especially for sewing or acupuncture.
To tease in order to provoke; to poke fun at.
definitions.example: Billy needled his sister incessantly about her pimples.

definitions.definition: To form, or be formed, in the shape of a needle.
definitions.example: to needle crystals

definitions.definition: Worthy of being remarked or noted; notable
Uncommon; unusual
The science of health, its promotion and preservation.
Those conditions and practices that promote and preserve health.
definitions.example: Hygiene is an important consideration in places where food is prepared.

definitions.definition: Cleanliness.
definitions.example: They have poor personal hygiene.

definitions.definition: (of a macro) The property of having an expansion that is guaranteed not to cause the accidental capture of identifiers.
Someone who practices mysticism.
A precious stone, especially an orient pearl.
A member or descendant of the peoples and cultures of the Orient.
A lily cultivar of a widely varied group, with strong scent.
A person from the eastern region of a place.
Of a pearl or other precious stone: having a superior lustre.
Pertaining to the eastern part of the sky; happening before sunrise.
Happening in the eastern part of a given place or location.
Pertaining to the regions east of the Mediterranean, beyond the Roman Empire or the early Christian world; of the Near East, the Middle East or the Far East, now especially relating to East Asia.
Designating various types of aromatic tobacco grown in Turkey and the Balkans.
Freedom from some business or activity.
Free time given over to a specific purpose; occupation, activity.
A period during which official activity or business is formally suspended; an official holiday from university, law courts etc.
A holiday; a stretch of leisure time away from work or duty and devoted to rest or pleasure.
The act of vacating something; moving out.
definitions.example: The Conservative Party’s vacation of the centre ground gave an opportunity to its opponents.

definitions.definition: The act of making legally void.
To spend or take a vacation.
definitions.example: This year, we’re vacationing in Mexico.

definitions.definition: One who has won or often wins.
A point or goal that wins a competition.
A rampart of earth, stones etc. built up for defensive purposes.
A structure built for defense surrounding a city, castle etc.
definitions.example: The town wall was surrounded by a moat.

definitions.definition: Each of the substantial structures acting either as the exterior of or divisions within a structure.
definitions.example: We're adding another wall in this room during the remodeling.  The wind blew against the walls of the tent.

definitions.definition: A point of desperation.
A point of defeat or extinction.
An impediment to free movement.
definitions.example: A wall of police officers met the protesters before they reached the capitol steps.

definitions.definition: A type of butterfly (Lasiommata megera).
(often in combination) A barrier.
definitions.example: a seawall;  a firewall

definitions.definition: A barrier to vision.
Something with the apparent solidity and dimensions of a building wall.
definitions.example: a wall of sound;  a wall of water

definitions.definition: A divisive or containing structure in an organ or cavity.
(auction) A fictional bidder used to increase the price at an auction.
A doctor who tries to admit as few patients as possible.
A line of defenders set up between an opposing free-kick taker and the goal.
A personal notice board listing messages of interest to a particular user.
To enclose with, or as if with, a wall or walls.
definitions.example: He walled the study with books.

definitions.definition: A legendary serpentine or reptilian creature.
An animal of various species that resemble a dragon in appearance:
(with definite article, often capitalized) The constellation Draco.
A fierce and unpleasant woman; a harridan.
definitions.example: She’s a bit of a dragon.

definitions.definition: (with definite article, often capitalized) The (historical) Chinese empire or the People's Republic of China.
definitions.example: Napoleon already warned of the awakening of the Dragon.

definitions.definition: Something very formidable or dangerous.
A type of playing-tile (red dragon, green dragon, white dragon) in the game of mahjong.
A luminous exhalation from marshy ground, seeming to move through the air like a winged serpent.
A short musket hooked to a swivel attached to a soldier's belt; so called from a representation of a dragon's head at the muzzle.
A background process similar to a daemon.
A variety of carrier pigeon.
A 45 RPM vinyl record with one song on side A and one on side B.
A popular song released and sold (on any format) nominally on its own though usually having at least one extra track.
definitions.example: The Offspring released four singles from their most recent album.

definitions.definition: One who is not married or does not have a romantic partner.
definitions.example: He went to the party, hoping to meet some friendly singles there.

definitions.definition: A score of one run.
A hit in baseball where the batter advances to first base.
A tile that has a different value (i.e. number of pips) at each end.
A bill valued at $1.
definitions.example: I don't have any singles, so you'll have to make change.

definitions.definition: A one-way ticket.
A score of one point, awarded when a kicked ball is dead within the non-kicking team's end zone or has exited that end zone. Officially known in the rules as a rouge.
(chiefly in the plural) A game with one player on each side, as in tennis.
One of the reeled filaments of silk, twisted without doubling to give them firmness.
A handful of gleaned grain.
A floating-point number having half the precision of a double-precision value.
To identify or select one member of a group from the others; generally used with out, either to single out or to single (something) out.
definitions.example: Eddie singled out his favorite marble from the bag.

definitions.definition: To get a hit that advances the batter exactly one base.
definitions.example: Pedro singled in the bottom of the eighth inning, which, if converted to a run, would put the team back into contention.

definitions.definition: To thin out.
(of a horse) To take the irregular gait called singlefoot.
To sequester; to withdraw; to retire.
To take alone, or one by one.
Not accompanied by anything else; one in number.

definitions.definition: Not divided in parts.

definitions.definition: Designed for the use of only one.
definitions.example: a single room

definitions.definition: Performed by one person, or one on each side.
definitions.example: a single combat

definitions.definition: Not married or (in modern times) not involved in a romantic relationship without being married or not dating anyone exclusively.
definitions.example: Forms often ask if a person is single, married, divorced or widowed. In this context, a person who is dating someone but who has never married puts "single".

definitions.definition: Having only one rank or row of petals.
Simple and honest; sincere, without deceit.
Uncompounded; pure; unmixed.
Simple; foolish; weak; silly.
A piece of clothing worn on the upper body outside a shirt or blouse, often waist length to thigh length.
A piece of a person's suit, beside trousers and, sometimes, waistcoat; coat (US)

definitions.definition: To enclose or encase in a jacket or other covering.
Not active, temporarily or permanently.

definitions.definition: Not functioning or operating; broken down

definitions.definition: Retired from duty or service.

definitions.definition: Relatively inert.

definitions.definition: Showing no optical activity in polarized light.

definitions.definition: To establish the identity of someone or something.
To disclose the identity of someone.

To streak; to variegate

Any imaginary line perpendicular to the equator and part of a great circle passing through the North Pole and South Pole.
Length.
To fail to care for or attend to something.

definitions.definition: To omit to notice; to forbear to treat with attention or respect; to slight.

Suffering from neglect.
A vampire.
A protuberance on the face housing the nostrils, which are used to breathe or smell.

definitions.definition: A snout, the nose of an animal.
The tip of an object.

definitions.definition: A perfumer.
The power of smelling.
Bouquet, the smell of something, especially wine.
The skill in recognising bouquet.
definitions.example: It is essential that a winetaster develops a good nose.

definitions.definition: (by extension) Skill at finding information.
definitions.example: A successful reporter has a nose for news.

definitions.definition: A downward projection from a cornice.
An informer.
To move cautiously by advancing its front end.
definitions.example: The ship nosed through the minefield.

definitions.definition: To snoop.
definitions.example: She was nosing around other people’s business.

definitions.definition: To detect by smell or as if by smell.
To push with one's nose; to nuzzle.
To defeat (as in a race or other contest) by a narrow margin; sometimes with out.

definitions.definition: To furnish with a nose.
definitions.example: to nose a stair tread

To travel by hoverboard.
An instance of having won a competition or battle or succeeded in an effort.

definitions.definition: The condition of having succeeded in a conflict or other effort.
A winged figure representing victory, common in Roman official iconography. See Winged victory.
To achieve a victory
To pour a liquid in a very thin stream, or so that drops fall continuously.
definitions.example: The doctor trickled some iodine on the wound.

definitions.definition: To flow in a very thin stream or drop continuously.
definitions.example: Here the water just trickles along, but later it becomes a torrent.

definitions.definition: To move or roll slowly.
The act of adorning, embellishing, or honoring; ornamentation.
That which adorns, enriches, or beautifies; something added by way of embellishment; ornament.
Specifically, any mark of honor to be worn upon the person, as a medal, cross, or ribbon of an order of knighthood, bestowed for services in war, great achievements in literature, art, etc.

(heading, physical) To move or be moved into something.

To conceal and appropriate.
To keep out of sight; to suppress; to ignore.
To pay absolutely.

definitions.definition: To reduce or extinguish by payment.

definitions.definition: To be overwhelmed or depressed; to fail in strength.

Caused, by natural or unnatural means, to be depressed (lower than the surrounding area) or submerged
definitions.example: The sunken ship lay at a depth of 100 feet

definitions.definition: (of eyes or cheeks) Seeming to have fallen deeper back into the face due to tiredness, illness, or old age.
definitions.example: She looked old and thin with sunken cheeks and hollow eyes.

definitions.definition: Negative effects, such as headache or nausea, caused by previous drunkenness due to (excessive) consumption of alcohol.
definitions.example: I really enjoyed yesterday’s party, but now I have the biggest hangover – I’ll not be doing that again any time soon.

An unpleasant relic left from prior events.
A sleeping arrangement, usually in homeless shelters, over a rope.
To set fire to, especially by use of a torch (flaming stick).
definitions.example: Some hoodlums had torched a derelict automobile, which emitted a ghastly pall of thick, black smoke that filled the street.

definitions.definition: The claw of a predatory animal or bird.
(by extension) A grip, especially one seen as rapacious or evil.
A device to interrupt power transmission, commonly used to separate the engine and gearbox in a car.

A small handbag or purse with no straps or handle.
To seize, as though with claws.

definitions.definition: To grip or grasp tightly.
definitions.example: She clutched her purse tightly and walked nervously into the building.

definitions.definition: A form of connection.
A connected group.
The centre of something.

The relationship between a vendor and a jurisdiction for the purpose of taxation, established for example by the vendor operating a physical store in that jurisdiction.
A professional who designs buildings or other structures, or who prepares plans and superintends construction.
definitions.example: Plato made the causes of things to be matter, ideas, and an efficient architect.

definitions.definition: A person who plans, devises or contrives the achievement of a desired result.
definitions.example: Peisistratus was the first architect of the Iliad and the Odyssey.

definitions.definition: A title given to architects. Usually capitalized or abbreviated as Arch./Ar. before the person's name.

definitions.example: He architected the military coup against the government.

definitions.definition: The winner in a fight or contest.
The letter V in the ICAO spelling alphabet.
A vehicle used in farms e.g. for pulling farm equipment and preparing the fields.
A truck (or lorry) for pulling a semi-trailer or trailer.
Any piece of machinery that pulls something.
An airplane where the propeller is located in front of the fuselage

A metal rod used in tractoration, or Perkinism.

To treat by means of tractoration, or Perkinism.
A subgenre of electronic music employing unstable rhythms, complex time signatures, and mid-range synths.
Lopsided, misaligned or off-centre.
Feeble, shaky or rickety.
(especially Usenet) Suffering from intermittent bugs.
Generally incorrect.

definitions.example: This loom weaves yarn into sweaters.

definitions.definition: To spin a cocoon or a web.
definitions.example: Spiders weave beautiful but deadly webs.

definitions.definition: To unite by close connection or intermixture.
To compose creatively and intricately; to fabricate.

definitions.definition: To move by turning and twisting.
definitions.example: The drunk weaved into another bar.

definitions.definition: To make (a path or way) by winding in and out or from side to side.
definitions.example: The ambulance weaved its way through the heavy traffic.

definitions.definition: The process of making woven material on a loom.
A piece of such material.
An unsteady motion back and forth.
Tumultuous, noisy excitement.
Loud confused noise, especially when coming from several sources.
A loud protest, controversy, outrage
To throw into uproar or confusion.
To make an uproar.
To remove from a package or container, particularly with respect to items that had previously been arranged closely and securely in a pack.
definitions.example: They didn't have time to unpack their bags before going out to dinner.

definitions.definition: To empty containers that had been packed.
definitions.example: They didn't have time to unpack before going to dinner.

definitions.definition: To analyze a concept or a text.
(of a segment such as a vowel) To undergo separation of its features into distinct segments.
To decompress.

A man of gentle but not noble birth, particularly a man of means (originally ownership of property) who does not work for a living but has no official status in a peerage; an armiferous man ranking below a knight.
definitions.example: Being a gentleman, Robert was entitled to shove other commoners into the gongpit but he still had to jump out of the way of the knights to avoid the same fate himself.

definitions.definition: Any well-bred, well-mannered, or charming man.
An effeminate or oversophisticated man.
definitions.example: Well, la-di-da, aren't you just a proper gentleman?

definitions.definition: (polite term of address) Any man.
definitions.example: Please escort this gentleman to the gentlemen's room.

definitions.definition: (usually historical, sometimes derogatory) An amateur or dabbler in any field, particularly those of independent means.
An amateur player, particularly one whose wealth permits him to forego payment.
Full of ardor; fervent, passionate.
Burning; glowing; shining.
The area where a land battle is or was fought, which is not necessarily a field.
definitions.example: 1886 The night of the 16th of May found McPherson's command bivouacked from two to six miles west of the battlefield, along the line of the road to Vicksburg — Ulysses S. Grant, Personal memoirs of U.S. Grant, Chapter 35.

definitions.definition: Deviation of the path of a rolling ball from a straight line; slope; slant.
definitions.example: This putt has a big left-to right borrow on it.

definitions.definition: A borrow pit.
In the Rust programming language, the situation where the ownership of a value is temporarily transferred to another region of code.
To receive (something) from somebody temporarily, expecting to return it.
To take money from a bank under the agreement that the bank will be paid over the course of time.
To adopt (an idea) as one's own.
definitions.example: to borrow the style, manner, or opinions of another

definitions.definition: To adopt a word from another language.

In a subtraction, to deduct (one) from a digit of the minuend and add ten to the following digit, in order that the subtraction of a larger digit in the subtrahend from the digit in the minuend to which ten is added gives a positive result.
(Upper Midwestern United States) To lend.
To temporarily obtain (something) for (someone).
To feign or counterfeit.
(obsolete except in ballads) To secure the release of (someone) from prison.
To receive (something) from somebody, with little possibility of returning it.
definitions.example: Can I borrow a sheet of paper?

definitions.definition: To fiddle with something in an attempt to fix, mend or improve it, especially in an experimental or unskilled manner.
To work as a tinker.
To tinker with; to tweak or attempt to fix.
An experimental fix or change.

The shape of a five-pointed star constructed of five intersecting lines meeting at the vertices, such that a central pentagon and five surrounding isosceles triangles are formed; often with magical connotations; a 5/2 (or 5/3) star polygon.
To start a motorcycle.
definitions.example: He kick started the motorcycle and took off.

definitions.definition: To start or begin strongly or quickly.
definitions.example: Kick start your day with a hearty breakfast.

definitions.definition: To make (something) active, functional, or productive again; to reinvigorate (an activity, system, or process).
definitions.example: To kick start the economy with a large construction project.

definitions.definition: The act or state of being or making something complete; conclusion, accomplishment.
The conclusion of an act of conveyancing concerning the sale of a property.
A forward pass that is successfully caught by the intended receiver.
The act of making a metric space complete by adding points.
The space resulting from such an act.
A food made from ground roasted cocoa beans.
definitions.example: Chocolate is a very popular treat.

definitions.definition: A drink made by dissolving this food in boiling milk or water.
A single, small piece of confectionery made from chocolate.
definitions.example: He bought her some chocolates as a gift. She ate one chocolate and threw the rest away.

definitions.definition: A dark, reddish-brown colour/color, like that of chocolate (also called chocolate brown).
definitions.example: As he cooked it the whole thing turned a rich, deep chocolate.

definitions.definition: A black person; blackness.
(chiefly in the past participle) To add chocolate to; to cover (food) in chocolate.
To treat blood agar by heating in order to lyse the red blood cells in the medium.
Made of or containing chocolate.
Having a dark reddish-brown colour/color.
Black (relating to any of various ethnic groups having dark pigmentation of the skin).
Almost but not quite.
definitions.example: With our medicare supplemental insurance plan, there are virtually no claim forms to fill out. (Advertisement)

definitions.definition: Without exaggeration.
In essence, but not in fact.
Of a substructure of finite index.

definitions.definition: Of a covering space of finite index.
definitions.example: virtually Haken

definitions.definition: An empty space; a vacuum.
definitions.example: Nobody has crossed the void since one man died trying three hundred years ago; it's high time we had another go.

definitions.definition: An extended region of space containing no galaxies
A collection of adjacent vacancies inside a crystal lattice.
A pocket of vapour inside a fluid flow, created by cavitation.
An empty space between floors or walls, including false separations and planned gaps between a building and its facade.
To make invalid or worthless.
definitions.example: He voided the check and returned it.

definitions.definition: To empty.
definitions.example: void one’s bowels

definitions.definition: To throw or send out; to evacuate; to emit; to discharge.
definitions.example: to void excrement

definitions.definition: To withdraw, depart.
To remove the contents of; to make or leave vacant or empty; to quit; to leave.
definitions.example: to void a table

definitions.definition: Containing nothing; empty; not occupied or filled.
Having no incumbent; unoccupied; said of offices etc.
Being without; destitute; devoid.
Not producing any effect; ineffectual; vain.
Of no legal force or effect, incapable of confirmation or ratification.
Containing no immaterial quality; destitute of mind or soul.
(of a function or method) That does not return a value.
The act of speaking in a quiet voice, especially, without vibration of the vocal cords.
(usually in the plural) A rumor.

definitions.definition: A faint trace or hint (of something).
definitions.example: The soup had just a whisper of basil.

definitions.definition: A low rustling sound, like that of the wind in leaves.
A private message to an individual in a chat room.

To speak softly, or under the breath, so as to be heard only by one near at hand; to utter words without sonant breath; to talk without that vibration in the larynx which gives sonorous, or vocal, sound.
To mention privately and confidentially, or in a whisper.
To make a low, sibilant sound.
To speak with suspicion or timorous caution; to converse in whispers, as in secret plotting.
To address in a whisper, or low voice.
To prompt secretly or cautiously; to inform privately.
Injury or harm; the condition or measure of something not being intact.

definitions.definition: Cost or expense.

definitions.definition: To impair the soundness, goodness, or value of; to harm or cause destruction.
definitions.example: Be careful not to damage any of the fragile items while unpacking them.

definitions.definition: To undergo damage.
A drug that numbs the pain in the body.
To call out; to draw out or bring forth.
To cause the manifestation of something (emotion, picture, etc.) in someone's mind or imagination.

definitions.definition: To elicit a response.
A hard, fine-grained quartz that fractures conchoidally and generates sparks when struck.
A piece of flint, such as a gunflint, used to produce a spark by striking it with a firestriker.
A small cylinder of some other material of the same function in a cigarette lighter, etc.
A type of maize/corn with a hard outer hull.
Anything figuratively hard.
To furnish or decorate an object with flint.
Material formed of thin sheets glued together.
To assemble from thin sheets glued together.

definitions.definition: To cover something flat, usually paper, in adhesive protective plastic.
To form, as metal, into a thin plate, as by rolling.
To cause to separate into thin plates or layers; to divide into thin plates.
Consisting of, or covered with, laminae, or thin plates, scales, or layers, one over another; laminated.
A structure built by a bird as a place to incubate eggs and rear young.
A place used by another mammal, fish, amphibian or insect, for depositing eggs and hatching young.
A snug, comfortable, or cosy residence or job situation.
A retreat, or place of habitual resort.
A hideout for bad people to frequent or haunt; a den.

definitions.definition: A home that a child or young adult shares with a parent or guardian.

definitions.definition: A fortified position for a weapon.
A structure consisting of nested structures, such as nested loops or nested subroutine calls.
A circular bed of pasta, rice, etc. to be topped or filled with other foods.
An aggregated mass of any ore or mineral, in an isolated state, within a rock.
A collection of boxes, cases, or the like, of graduated size, each put within the one next larger.
A compact group of pulleys, gears, springs, etc., working together or collectively.
(of animals) To build or settle into a nest.
To settle into a home.

definitions.definition: To successively neatly fit inside another.
definitions.example: I bought a set of nesting mixing bowls for my mother.

definitions.definition: To place in, or as if in, a nest.
To place one thing neatly inside another, and both inside yet another (and so on).

definitions.definition: To hunt for birds' nests or their contents (usually "go nesting").
A (sometimes unsophisticated) person from a rural area.
A noctuoid moth.
Any of various nymphalid butterflies having brown and orange wings, especially Cupha erymanthis.
Country-styled or pastoral; rural.
Unfinished or roughly finished.

definitions.definition: Crude, rough.

definitions.definition: Simple; artless; unaffected.
To devastate, destroy
To squander (money or resources) uselessly; to spend (time) idly.
definitions.example: We wasted millions of dollars and several years on that project.

definitions.definition: To kill; to murder.
To wear away by degrees; to impair gradually; to diminish by constant loss; to use up; to consume; to spend; to wear out.
Gradually lose weight, weaken, become frail.
To be diminished; to lose bulk, substance, strength, value etc. gradually.
To damage, impair, or injure (an estate, etc.) voluntarily, or by allowing the buildings, fences, etc., to fall into decay.
Gradual deterioration or wasting away.

definitions.definition: A necktie.
A chignon.
A beard.

definitions.definition: To fall like a waterfall.
To drink (something) from a container by pouring it from a height so as not to touch one's lips to the rim.

definitions.definition: A file transfer to the local computer.

A covered walk with an open colonnade on one side, running along the walls of buildings that face a quadrangle; especially:

The monastic life.
To become a Roman Catholic religious.
To confine in a cloister, voluntarily or not.
To deliberately withdraw from worldly things.
To provide with a cloister or cloisters.

definitions.definition: To protect or isolate.
A large wasp, of the genus Vespa, having a brown-and-yellow-striped body and the ability to inflict a serious sting.
A person who pesters with petty but ceaseless attacks.
Something opposite or contrary to something else.
An opponent.
An antonym.

definitions.definition: An additive inverse.
Located directly across from something else, or from each other.

definitions.definition: Of leaves and flowers, positioned directly across from each other on a stem.
Facing in the other direction.

definitions.definition: Of either of two complementary or mutually exclusive things.

definitions.definition: Extremely different; inconsistent; contrary; repugnant; antagonistic.
In an opposite position.

definitions.definition: Facing, or across from.

definitions.definition: In a complementary role to.

definitions.definition: On another channel at the same time.

definitions.definition: Something that is variable.

A symbol representing a variable.
A named memory location in which a program can store intermediate results and from which it can read them.
A variable star.
A shifting wind, or one that varies in force.

A long journey, especially by ship.
The act or practice of travelling.
To go on a long journey.
To make something western in character.
A composition, normally in prose, telling a story and intended to be represented by actors impersonating the characters and speaking the dialogue
Such a work for television, radio or the cinema (usually one that is not a comedy)
Theatrical plays in general
A situation in real life that has the characteristics of such a theatrical play

Rumor, lying or exaggerated reaction to life or online events; melodrama; an angry dispute or scene; a situation made more complicated or worse than it should be; intrigue or spiteful interpersonal maneuvering.
The power, right, or authority to interpret and apply the law.
The power or right to exercise authority.
The power or right to perform some action as part of applying the law.

The limits or territory within which authority may be exercised.
The thing implied.

definitions.definition: To imply without entailing; to have as an implicature.
To fold or twist together, intertwine, interlace, entangle, entwine.
Auspicious.

definitions.definition: Happening by good luck or favorable chance.

definitions.definition: Favored by fortune.

definitions.definition: To cause to move in a curve.
To make into a curl or spiral.
To assume the shape of a curl or spiral.
To move in curves.
To take part in the sport of curling.
definitions.example: I curl at my local club every weekend.

definitions.definition: To exercise by bending the arm, wrist, or leg on the exertion against resistance, especially of the biceps.
To twist or form (the hair, etc.) into ringlets.

To raise in waves or undulations; to ripple.

The action or motion of something that curls or is curled.

definitions.definition: A winter sport where players aim and slide stones down a sheet of ice and attempt to get their color stones closest to the house (a circular target marked on the ice).
(ditransitive) To give a name to.

definitions.definition: To mention, specify.

definitions.definition: To identify as relevant or important

definitions.definition: To designate for a role.
definitions.example: My neighbor was named to the steering committee.

The process of giving names to things.
A ritual or ceremony in which a person's name is given or announced.
Giving a name to a person or thing.
A person given to excess in the consumption of food and drink; a greedy or ravenous eater.
A person who appreciates good food.
A virtual member function of a class.
In effect or essence, if not in fact or reality; imitated, simulated.

definitions.definition: Having the power of acting or of invisible efficacy without the agency of the material or measurable part; potential.
Nearly, almost. (A relatively recent development in meaning)
definitions.example: The angry peasants were a virtual army as they attacked the castle.

definitions.definition: Simulated in a computer or online.

definitions.definition: Operating by computer or in cyberspace; not physically present.

definitions.definition: (of a class member) Capable of being overridden with a different implementation in a subclass.
Pertaining to particles in temporary existence due to the Heisenberg uncertainty principle.
The area where a land battle is or was fought, which is not necessarily a field.
definitions.example: 1886 The night of the 16th of May found McPherson's command bivouacked from two to six miles west of the battlefield, along the line of the road to Vicksburg — Ulysses S. Grant, Personal memoirs of U.S. Grant, Chapter 35.

definitions.definition: Model, example.

A naturally-occurring or random arrangement of shapes, colours etc. which have a regular or decorative effect.
The given spread, range etc. of shot fired from a gun.

A sequence of notes, percussion etc. in a tracker module, usable once or many times within the song.
To apply a pattern.

To fit into a pattern.
To serve as an example for.

Not the same.
Out of balance.
Inadequate; insufficiently capable or qualified.

definitions.definition: (of people) Sickly, unwell.

definitions.definition: High or too high in acidity.

definitions.definition: Having a sexual connotation.
Having a color charge of green.
Being or relating to the green currencies of the European Union.

An account of first-hand experience.
In a church service, a personal account, such as of one's conversion.
Witness; evidence; proof of some fact.

With speed; in a rapid manner.

Showing or expressing empathy.
Of, pertaining to, or being an empath: of or having the capability of sensing the emotions of others.
To lead by persuasion or influence; incite or prevail upon.
To cause, bring about, lead to.

To lead in, bring in, introduce.
